title: Now Hiring Medical Officer at Metropolis Healthcare

jsonLd.title: Now Hiring Medical Officer at Metropolis Healthcare
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Medical Officer looking for your next big career move? Metropolis Healthcare in Patna offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Metropolis Healthcare:
Metropolis Healthcare is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Professional development and training programs
• Learning & development budget
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual performance appraisal
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Patna, Bihar, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Metropolis Healthcare!
